Patch Set 6:

Quentin – The touch added by this patch is failing and nothing after the touch is executed:
09:06:25:Formatting mgs, mds, osts
09:06:25:Format mds1: /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1
09:06:25:touch: cannot touch '/dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P1': No such file or directory
09:06:50:Tests running for 155 minutes, 0 restarts, current suite:test lustre-initialization-1:lustre-initialization_1

Why the touch is failing, I’m not sure.

parents.subject: LU-4640 mdt: implement Remove Archive on Last Unlink policy

commit.subject: LU-7884 utils: mkfs prevents the creation of files in /dev/shm
commit.message:
LU-7884 utils: mkfs prevents the creation of files in /dev/shm

When configuring llmount to use /dev/shm as its TMP directory
(for loopback files), mkfs.lustre complains that the loopback does
not exist and will not be created.
This patch fixes this by adding a "touch" instruction before any use
of mkfs.lustre in test-framework.sh

Signed-off-by: Quentin Bouget <quentin.bouget@cea.fr>
Change-Id: I1422d8af947db5ba5b262a9acd2239e99f0843c2
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/18984
Reviewed-by: Henri Doreau <henri.doreau@cea.fr>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
